description.en: Systematic visualisation of the post-resection mucosal defect: detection and treatment of residual adenoma at margin and within the defect, recognition of deep mural injury (Sydney DMI classification), and decision-making about clip closure and surveillance.

criteria.en: Inspects the defect inconsistently; requires prompts to look for residual tissue.
Systematically inspects margin and defect; detects and treats residual tissue; identifies DMI ≥ Sydney II and closes appropriately.
Teaches systematic defect assessment; manages complex closures.
